title: Plug Power Earnings Beat Analyst Expectations with Revenue and EPS Surprise
text: Plug Power exceeded analyst expectations in Q1 2026 earnings, delivering a positive earnings surprise and beating revenue estimates. The company reported revenue of $163.5 million, surpassing consensus estimates, and adjusted EPS of negative $0.08 versus expectations of negative $0.09. Gross margin improved significantly, moving from negative 55% in the prior year to negative 13%, representing a 42 percentage point improvement. The electrolyzer business showed exceptional growth with revenue jumping 343% year-over-year. Material handling platform revenue grew 15% year-over-year excluding warrant charges. Hydrogen fuel sales increased 10% with a 54 percentage point margin improvement. The company ended the quarter with $802 million in total cash and expects over $275 million in non-dilutive asset monetization proceeds throughout 2026. Management reaffirmed targets for positive EBITDAS by Q4 2026.
